name: Campfire RSVP
description: A cross-platform planning app built to make invites, RSVPs, and group coordination more reliable than a text thread.
role: Solo build across product, app, backend, and release
focus: Auth reliability, testing strategy, cross-platform UX

name: Dockly
description: An installable map app for discovering and contributing trustworthy bike parking data with offline-friendly mobile performance.
role: Solo build from product concept to shipped PWA
focus: Maps UX, performance, and contribution flows
